form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation 17th of 19 at Fairyhouse in the LR December 3 2023 over 3218m, soft track; 27 len behind Common Practice with 73kg at $21. Previous preparation first-up to post a big 3.5 len win. Listowel September 22 2023 over 2816m defeating Minella Mate with 66.5kg at $4.50. Likely to run very well.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of six months. First up last campaign eighth of 14 at Dundalk All Weather March 21 2025 over 2112m, 5 len behind Annaghmccanns carrying 58kg at $15. Can feature in the finish.
